requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (CODINORM NI / IEC 62471)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（CODINORM NI / IEC 62471）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（CODINORM NI / IEC 62471）

summary.en: Côte d'Ivoire does not have an EU Ecodesign-style legal mandate that specifically requires photobiological risk-group declaration for every LED light source. Where photobiological safety is assessed, it is through CODINORM national standards (NI) adopting the IEC base — IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which classifies products into risk groups RG0 (Exempt) to RG3 (High risk) based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance. In practice, IEC 62471 evidence may be requested within the import Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme as part of the general product-safety assessment for luminaires, rather than as a standalone declaration with its own label. RG2 and RG3 products should carry usage warnings. Confirm whether photobiological evidence is required for the specific product with CODINORM and the appointed conformity-assessment body.
summary.zh: 科特迪瓦没有欧盟生态设计式、专门要求对每个 LED 光源进行光生物危险组别声明的法律强制规定。若评估光生物安全，则通过采用 IEC 基础的 CODINORM 国家标准（NI）——IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），依据蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度将产品分为 RG0（豁免）至 RG3（高危险）危险组别。实务中，IEC 62471 证据可能在进口符合性验证（VoC）计划内作为灯具一般产品安全评估的一部分被要求，而非作为带专属标签的独立声明。RG2 和 RG3 产品应附带使用警告。请就具体产品向 CODINORM 及指定合格评定机构确认是否要求光生物证据。
summary.zht: 科特迪瓦沒有歐盟生態設計式、專門要求對每個 LED 光源進行光生物危險組別聲明的法律強制規定。若評估光生物安全，則通過採用 IEC 基礎的 CODINORM 國家標準（NI）——IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），依據藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度將產品分為 RG0（豁免）至 RG3（高危險）危險組別。實務中，IEC 62471 證據可能在進口符合性驗證（VoC）計劃內作為燈具一般產品安全評估的一部分被要求，而非作為帶專屬標籤的獨立聲明。RG2 和 RG3 產品應附帶使用警告。請就具體產品向 CODINORM 及指定合格評定機構確認是否要求光生物證據。

standards_or_laws: CODINORM national standards (NI) adopting IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems
Verification of Conformity (VoC) import programme — Ministry of Trade / CODINORM (where photobiological evidence is requested)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement for residential luminaires is not uniformly prescribed. The risk-group classification framework (RG0–RG3) is shared with the IEC base.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；对居民灯具的执行未统一规定。危险组别分类框架（RG0–RG3）与 IEC 基础共通。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；對居民燈具的執行未統一規定。危險組別分類框架（RG0–RG3）與 IEC 基礎共通。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, equivalent to IEC 62471:2006)

gap.en: Both Côte d'Ivoire (via CODINORM NI / IEC 62471) and China (via GB/T 20145) share the same IEC risk-group framework, so the technical assessment is largely transferable — a Chinese IEC 62471 / GB/T 20145 risk-group test report is a useful starting point. The differences are: (1) neither market imposes the EU-style standalone legal photobiological declaration, but Côte d'Ivoire may request IEC 62471 evidence inside the VoC product-safety assessment, whereas Chinese GB/T 20145 is recommended-only; (2) any product warnings and documentation for Côte d'Ivoire must be in French; (3) RG2/RG3 luminaires should carry usage warnings in both markets. Manufacturers should keep a defensible IEC 62471 risk-group assessment in the technical file and confirm with the appointed VoC body whether it must be submitted for the specific product.
gap.zh: 科特迪瓦（通过 CODINORM NI / IEC 62471）和中国（通过 GB/T 20145）共享相同的 IEC 危险组别框架，故技术评估基本可转移——中国 IEC 62471 / GB/T 20145 危险组别检测报告是有用的起点。差异在于：（1）两市场均不实行欧盟式独立法律光生物声明，但科特迪瓦可能在 VoC 产品安全评估内要求 IEC 62471 证据，而中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐；（2）科特迪瓦的任何产品警告和文件须为法语；（3）RG2/RG3 灯具在两市场均应附带使用警告。制造商应在技术文件中保留可辩护的 IEC 62471 危险组别评估，并向指定 VoC 机构确认具体产品是否须提交。
gap.zht: 科特迪瓦（通過 CODINORM NI / IEC 62471）和中國（通過 GB/T 20145）共享相同的 IEC 危險組別框架，故技術評估基本可轉移——中國 IEC 62471 / GB/T 20145 危險組別檢測報告是有用的起點。差異在於：（1）兩市場均不實行歐盟式獨立法律光生物聲明，但科特迪瓦可能在 VoC 產品安全評估內要求 IEC 62471 證據，而中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦；（2）科特迪瓦的任何產品警告和文件須為法語；（3）RG2/RG3 燈具在兩市場均應附帶使用警告。製造商應在技術文件中保留可辯護的 IEC 62471 危險組別評估，並向指定 VoC 機構確認具體產品是否須提交。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no EU-style standalone photobiological declaration law; IEC 62471 evidence may be requested within the VoC product-safety assessment via CODINORM NI. RG2/RG3 products should carry usage warnings (in French).
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Côte d'Ivoire has no EU-style standalone legal photobiological declaration; risk-group classification is handled through IEC 62471-based CODINORM national standards (NI) and may be requested within the import Verification of Conformity (VoC) product-safety assessment. The IEC 62471 risk-group framework is shared with China's GB/T 20145, so a Chinese risk-group report transfers well, but Chinese GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and is not accepted as a substitute clearance document. Keep a defensible IEC 62471 assessment in the technical file, provide French-language warnings for RG2/RG3 products, and confirm submission requirements with the appointed VoC body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 科特迪瓦无欧盟式独立法律光生物声明；危险组别分类通过基于 IEC 62471 的 CODINORM 国家标准（NI）处理，并可能在进口符合性验证（VoC）产品安全评估内被要求。IEC 62471 危险组别框架与中国 GB/T 20145 共通，故中国危险组别报告可良好转移，但中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐，不被接受作为替代清关文件。请在技术文件中保留可辩护的 IEC 62471 评估、为 RG2/RG3 产品提供法语警告，并向指定 VoC 机构确认提交要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 科特迪瓦無歐盟式獨立法律光生物聲明；危險組別分類通過基於 IEC 62471 的 CODINORM 國家標準（NI）處理，並可能在進口符合性驗證（VoC）產品安全評估內被要求。IEC 62471 危險組別框架與中國 GB/T 20145 共通，故中國危險組別報告可良好轉移，但中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦，不被接受作為替代清關文件。請在技術文件中保留可辯護的 IEC 62471 評估、為 RG2/RG3 產品提供法語警告，並向指定 VoC 機構確認提交要求。

requirement_topic.en: Blue Light Hazard Labelling — No Mandatory Label Regime (Côte d'Ivoire)
requirement_topic.zh: 蓝光危害标注——无强制标签制度（科特迪瓦）
requirement_topic.zht: 藍光危害標註——無強制標籤制度（科特迪瓦）

summary.en: Côte d'Ivoire does not operate the EU energy-labelling framework (Delegated Reg 2019/2015) and therefore has no legal requirement equivalent to the EU blue-light-hazard class that must appear on the product energy label. There is no mandatory plain-language blue-light class ('No risk / Low risk / Moderate risk') prescribed for LED luminaire packaging in Côte d'Ivoire. General product-safety good practice still applies: RG2/RG3 products (per the IEC 62471 assessment in ledci-photobio-01) should carry appropriate usage warnings, and any such warnings and instructions must be in French. Manufacturers should confirm current requirements with CODINORM, as the regime may evolve toward IEC/regional labelling practice over time.
summary.zh: 科特迪瓦不运营欧盟能源标签框架（授权法规 2019/2015），因此没有相当于欧盟蓝光危害等级、须出现在产品能效标签上的法律要求。科特迪瓦未对 LED 灯具包装规定强制性通俗语言蓝光等级（"无危险/低危险/中等危险"）。一般产品安全良好实践仍然适用：RG2/RG3 产品（依 ledci-photobio-01 的 IEC 62471 评估）应附带适当使用警告，且任何此类警告和说明须为法语。制造商应向 CODINORM 确认现行要求，因该制度可能随时间向 IEC/区域标签实践演进。
summary.zht: 科特迪瓦不運營歐盟能源標籤框架（授權法規 2019/2015），因此沒有相當於歐盟藍光危害等級、須出現在產品能效標籤上的法律要求。科特迪瓦未對 LED 燈具包裝規定強制性通俗語言藍光等級（"無危險/低危險/中等危險"）。一般產品安全良好實踐仍然適用：RG2/RG3 產品（依 ledci-photobio-01 的 IEC 62471 評估）應附帶適當使用警告，且任何此類警告和說明須為法語。製造商應向 CODINORM 確認現行要求，因該制度可能隨時間向 IEC/區域標籤實踐演進。

standards_or_laws: No EU-equivalent blue-light-hazard labelling regime in Côte d'Ivoire
General product-safety good practice + French-language marking (Ministry of Trade / CODINORM)

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255 does not include a blue light hazard class either; the Chinese labelling regime focuses on energy-efficiency grades and lumen output. Neither China nor Côte d'Ivoire mandates the EU-style blue-light-class label on luminaire packaging, so on this specific point the two markets are aligned in not requiring it.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255 的中国能效标识（CEL）同样不包含蓝光危害等级；中国标签制度侧重能效等级及光通量输出。中国和科特迪瓦均不强制要求欧盟式蓝光等级标签出现在灯具包装上，故就此具体点两市场一致——均不要求。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255 的中國能效標識（CEL）同樣不包含藍光危害等級；中國標籤制度側重能效等級及光通量輸出。中國和科特迪瓦均不強制要求歐盟式藍光等級標籤出現在燈具包裝上，故就此具體點兩市場一致——均不要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR — no blue light class requirement)

gap.en: On the blue-light-class label specifically, there is no gap to close for Côte d'Ivoire: neither market requires the EU label class, so a Chinese product does not need to add it for Côte d'Ivoire (unlike the EU, where it is mandatory). The only carry-over obligations are: (1) any RG2/RG3 usage warnings derived from the IEC 62471 assessment should appear on the product, and (2) those warnings, like all product information, must be in French for Côte d'Ivoire. Do not assume the EU blue-light label is required here — it is not. Re-verify with CODINORM if the regime changes.
gap.zh: 就蓝光等级标签具体而言，科特迪瓦无需弥补差距：两市场均不要求欧盟标签等级，故中国产品出口科特迪瓦无需添加（与欧盟不同，欧盟为强制）。唯一延续的义务是：（1）依 IEC 62471 评估得出的任何 RG2/RG3 使用警告应出现在产品上；（2）这些警告与所有产品信息一样，对科特迪瓦须为法语。请勿假设此处要求欧盟蓝光标签——并不要求。若制度变化，请向 CODINORM 重新核验。
gap.zht: 就藍光等級標籤具體而言，科特迪瓦無需彌補差距：兩市場均不要求歐盟標籤等級，故中國產品出口科特迪瓦無需添加（與歐盟不同，歐盟為強制）。唯一延續的義務是：（1）依 IEC 62471 評估得出的任何 RG2/RG3 使用警告應出現在產品上；（2）這些警告與所有產品信息一樣，對科特迪瓦須為法語。請勿假設此處要求歐盟藍光標籤——並不要求。若制度變化，請向 CODINORM 重新核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Not required — no EU-equivalent blue-light-hazard label regime in Côte d'Ivoire. RG2/RG3 usage warnings (in French) remain good practice under general product safety.
mandatory_status.cn: Not required — China Energy Label (GB 30255) does not include a blue light hazard class

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Côte d'Ivoire does not operate the EU energy-labelling framework and has no mandatory blue-light-hazard class label for LED luminaires — unlike the EU, where it is required. China's CEL likewise has no blue-light class, so on this point the two markets align. The only carry-over obligations are RG2/RG3 usage warnings derived from the IEC 62471 assessment and the general requirement that all product information and warnings be in French. Do not add the EU label class assuming it is required; re-verify with CODINORM if the regime evolves.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 科特迪瓦不运营欧盟能源标签框架，对 LED 灯具无强制蓝光危害等级标签——与欧盟不同，欧盟为强制。中国 CEL 同样无蓝光等级，故就此点两市场一致。唯一延续的义务是依 IEC 62471 评估得出的 RG2/RG3 使用警告，以及所有产品信息和警告须为法语的一般要求。请勿假设要求欧盟标签等级而添加；若制度演进，请向 CODINORM 重新核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 科特迪瓦不運營歐盟能源標籤框架，對 LED 燈具無強制藍光危害等級標籤——與歐盟不同，歐盟為強制。中國 CEL 同樣無藍光等級，故就此點兩市場一致。唯一延續的義務是依 IEC 62471 評估得出的 RG2/RG3 使用警告，以及所有產品信息和警告須為法語的一般要求。請勿假設要求歐盟標籤等級而添加；若制度演進，請向 CODINORM 重新核驗。
